en: She's not supposed to be here until 9.
Her driver just text messaged, and her facial is ruptured at ease.
ko: 운전기사가 문자를 보냈는데, 피부 관리가 일찍 끝났대.

en: That I can't even talk about.
All right, everyone, gird your loins.
Did someone eat an onion bagel?
I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry.
ko: 미안, 미안, 미안, 미안, 미안, 미안.
